# freeze-shas — marketplace entry names held at their CURRENT source.sha
# (NOT auto-bumped by bump-plugin-shas.yml). One slug per line; # comments
# and blank lines ignored. Distinct from sha-exempt (deliberately UNPINNED).
#
# Point-in-time snapshot (2026-06-13) of entries that genuinely fail
# 'validate-plugins' at upstream HEAD (manifest lost at new SHA, or a field
# the bump surfaces as an error). Freezing avoids bumping them into a red PR.
# The revert-failed-bumps loop is the live safety net for anything not listed
# here; remove a slug once its upstream is fixed to let it freshen again.
#
# Provenance: output/community-gate-analysis/genuine_freeze.txt in
# bryan-anthropic/mcp-local-directory (issue #1861 / PR #68 gate analysis).
